author: Alex S
subject: v2.5.2
body: ## [2.5.2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.5.1...v2.5.2) (2018-02-26) ### Bug Fixes * **Template:** harden Symbol checks ([#2749](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2749)) ([fab66bc](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/fab66bc)) * **yarnrc:** use empty string for save-prefix ([#2739](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2739)) ([979e0cd](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/979e0cd))
